{{Location|title=Kemet|imagecaption=Map of Kemet|image=File:KemetFullMap.png}}

==Kemet==
The magnificent river flows across the sand. At the end of the dusk stands the eternal tower!

Kemet is the 6th of 8 [[Realms]].
{{realm table}}

==Intel==
See [[Kemet INTEL]] for INTEL tables. 

==Apostles==
See [[Kemet Apostles]] for each Apostles' stats.

See [[Past and Future Apostles]] for information on all Apostles within the Past or Future of each Realm.

==Card Conversions==
See [[Kemet Cards]] for a list of all limited cards in Kemet and what they can be redeemed for. 

==Key Clue Records==
See [[Kemet Key Clues]] for a list of all Key Clues in Kemet, how to complete them, and what they reward. 

==Kemet Pyramids==
See [[Kemet Pyramid]] for information on the Pyramids used in Kemet tower defense.

==Ream Trait- Ma'at Tablet==
See [[Ma'at Tablet]] for information on costs, stats, and unsealing.

[[Category:Realm]]
[[Category:Kemet]]
